The substring in s must start with "a", end with "c", and have "b" somewhere in between, with any characters (including none) in between the parts.

So the approach is to split p into three segments: left, middle, and right. int len_middle = middle.size();
int len_right = right.size();

vector<int> L = findAllOccurrences(s, left);
vector<int> M = findAllOccurrences(s, middle);
vector<int> R = findAllOccurrences(s, right);

int min_len = INT_MAX;

for (int l : L) {
    int required_m = l + len_left;
    auto it_m = lower_bound(M.begin(), M.end(), required_m);

    if (current_len < min_len) {

}

    }
}

} else {
